content: LangGraph PyPI shows v1.2.6 and Python >=3.10; docs align on uv-based install and LangChain integration. FastAPI release notes show current line at 0.138.x with strict Pydantic v2 and raised lower bound >=2.9.0, indicating modern backend baseline should target Python 3.11/3.12 with Pydantic v2-native stack and Uvicorn ASGI runtime.
